title: StayVista South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: StayVista South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the StayVista South Asia Partners family as a E-commerce Executive in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StayVista South Asia Partners:
StayVista South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
